arts.ttl: Brighton midfielder Jakub Moder nearing £1.2m move to European giants - despite being offered a new long-term deal by the Seagulls
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Moder, who has now fully recovered from a long-term ACL injury, would be out of contract in the summer at Brighton but has been offered a three-and-a-half year deal.

arts.ttl: Juventus lay groundwork for Hancko with new Feyenoord idea
arts.sum: Juventus have set their sights on David Hancko to reinforce the injury-hit defence, but Feyenoord...
